expectations.text: Names a specific RLS root cause hypothesis
expectations.evidence: Function owner not BYPASSRLS as primary; migration drift + search_path hijack as runner-ups

expectations.text: Provides concrete SQL or code fix (not just generic advice)
expectations.evidence: Full migration file with DROP/CREATE/ALTER OWNER/REVOKE/GRANT in BEGIN..COMMIT block

expectations.text: Inspector Report block present at end of delivery
Inspector Report has OUTPUT and PROCESS pass/fail lines
expectations.evidence: OUTPUT: PASSED, PROCESS: PASSED both present

expectations.text: Inspector Report includes Code health and Security lines (CODING task)
Chat prose uses short sentences (avg <8 words)
expectations.evidence: Most sentences 5-12 words; intro line 'Symptom: works local, fails staging.' is caveman-style

expectations.text: No excess filler words in chat prose
expectations.evidence: Sparse use of articles and modals

expectations.text: Code blocks and SQL stay properly formatted
expectations.evidence: All SQL fenced and properly indented

expectations.text: No mention of GPT Agent / ChatGPT routing anywhere
expectations.evidence: GPT Agent fully absent from response
